name: Append New Feature to Homepage Features Section
prompt: Add 'Same-Day Delivery' as a new feature to our homepage features section. The description should be 'Order by noon, get it by 6pm.'

setup.content:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to our store"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Quality Goods, Fast"
  subheading="Everything you need, delivered with care."
/>

<Features
  heading="Why Shop With Us"
  features={[
    { title: "Fresh Products", description: "Sourced locally every day." },
    { title: "Easy Returns", description: "No questions asked, 30-day returns." }
  ]}
/>

content/pages/index.mdx: Order by noon, get it by 6pm.

checks.judge: The 'Same-Day Delivery' feature with description 'Order by noon, get it by 6pm.' is appended to the Features section on the homepage; both pre-existing features 'Fresh Products' and 'Easy Returns' are fully preserved

dry_run.text: I've appended 'Same-Day Delivery' with its description to the features section on your homepage, keeping 'Fresh Products' and 'Easy Returns' exactly as they were.

edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to our store"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Quality Goods, Fast"
  subheading="Everything you need, delivered with care."
/>

<Features
  heading="Why Shop With Us"
  features={[
    { title: "Fresh Products", description: "Sourced locally every day." },
    { title: "Easy Returns", description: "No questions asked, 30-day returns." },
    { title: "Same-Day Delivery", description: "Order by noon, get it by 6pm." }
  ]}
/>
